steps.title: Isolate $p$ on the left side
steps.content:
Starting from $p + 34 = q + r$, subtract $34$ from both sides to undo the $+34$:
$$p + 34 - 34 = q + r - 34$$
$$p = q + r - 34$$

steps.title: Check each choice
steps.content:
• A) $p = q + r + 34$: this would mean $p - 34 = q + r$, not $p + 34 = q + r$. Eliminate.
  • B) $p = q + r - 34$: adding $34$ to both sides gives $p + 34 = q + r$. Match.
  • C) $p = -q - r + 34$: implies $q + r = 34 - p$, not what's given. Eliminate.
  • D) $p = -q - r - 34$: implies $q + r = -p - 34$, not what's given. Eliminate.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
